title: Impaled
description: A mod that adds new Tridents, Sincere Loyalty (Loyalty IV) and a few tweaks and fixes to all tridents
body:
A mod that adds new Tridents, Sincere Loyalty (Loyalty IV) and a few tweaks and fixes to all tridents.

Video showcase: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=9JhblcRTRu8
